Run.Text: This note is stored as engine XML and rendered by the document view.

Paragraphs flow and wrap inside the editor viewport, and the whole document scrolls when it grows taller than the window. Keep typing past the edge to see the text reflow onto the next line within this same paragraph block.
Another paragraph follows the first with vertical spacing handled by the stack panel.
Another paragraph follows the first with vertical spacing handled by the stack panel.
Another paragraph follows the first with vertical spacing handled by the stack panel.
